references.text: [BuSu23] M. Buci\'C and B. Sudakov, Large independent sets from local considerations. arXiv:2007.03667 (2023).

remarks.text: A problem of Erd\H{o}s and Hajnal, who could prove that\[n^{1/3}\ll h(n) \ll n^{1/2}.\]Buci\'{c} and Sudakov \cite{BuSu23} have proved\[h(n) \gg n^{5/12-o(1)}.\]

statement.text: Let $h(n)$ be minimal such that every graph on $n$ vertices where every set of $7$ vertices contains a triangle (a copy of $K_3$) must contain a clique on at least $h(n)$ vertices. Estimate $h(n)$ - in particular, do there exist constants $c_1,c_2>0$ such that\[n^{1/3+c_1}\ll h(n) \ll n^{1/2-c_2}?\]
